title: CardRewriter: Leveraging Knowledge Cards for Long-Tail Query Rewriting on Short-Video Platforms

defines.name: CardRewriter
defines.definition: A retrieval-augmented LLM-based framework that uses summarized knowledge cards to improve long-tail query rewriting on short-video platforms.

uses: top-k videos retrieved by the original query
problem: LLM-based query rewriting struggles on short-video platforms because proprietary platform content is outside pretraining distribution, causing misinterpretation of long-tail and ambiguous queries.
